description: MaxViT unlabeled-KD sweep: T=4 alpha=0.50 with intermediate unlabeled KD=0.75 to test whether more legal unlabeled teacher signal improves transfer without fully copying overconfident logits.

scoring.notes: Post-grid MaxViT rescue: sweep unlabeled teacher pressure around 0.50/0.75/1.00 while keeping the same staged teacher and 45-epoch horizon. This tests a broad global KD-transfer hypothesis, not class-specific tuning.
